title: Macrocarpaea arborea
taxonomy: Macrocarpaea arborea is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It belongs to the genus Macrocarpaea, which is a group of plants known for their unique characteristics. Macrocarpaea arborea is native to the high-altitude regions of South America, specifically in the Andes mountains. As a member of the Gentianaceae family, Macrocarpaea arborea is closely related to other plants like gentians and willows. The classification of Macrocarpaea arborea reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the gentian family.
